mapper.select: SELECT td.device_id, td.nick_name AS deviceName, td.version, ttnr.id AS tunnelId FROM tunnel_devicelist td LEFT JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdt ON td.device_id = devicelist_id LEFT JOIN t_tunnel_name_result ttnr ON tdt.tunnel_id = ttnr.id WHERE ttnr.status = 0 AND td.version = #{version} AND td.device_type_id = #{deviceTypeId} ORDER BY ttnr.create_time

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT td.device_id) AS deviceCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.Online = 0 THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceOnline, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.Online = 1 THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceOffline, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.device_status = '故障' THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceBreakdown FROM tunnel_devicelist td INNER JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON td.device_id = tdi.devicelist_id AND tdi.type = 2 INNER JOIN t_user_tunnel u ON tdi.tunnel_id = u.tunnel_name_id AND u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT td.device_id) AS deviceCount, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.Online = 0 THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceOnline, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.Online = 1 THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceOffline, COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN td.device_status = '故障' THEN td.device_id END) AS deviceBreakdown FROM tunnel_devicelist td INNER JOIN tunnel_devicelist_tunnelinfo tdi ON td.device_id = tdi.devicelist_id AND tdi.type = 2
